name: Urea
desc: Nitrogen fertilizer for fast leaf growth.

name: DAP (Diammonium Phosphate)
desc: Provides nitrogen and phosphorus for roots.

name: NPK 19:19:19
desc: Balanced fertilizer for overall plant growth.

name: NPK 10:26:26
desc: High phosphorus fertilizer for strong roots.

name: MOP (Muriate of Potash)
desc: Improves fruit quality and plant strength.

name: Calcium Ammonium Nitrate
desc: Nitrogen fertilizer suitable for many crops.

name: Ammonium Sulphate
desc: Nitrogen fertilizer that also adds sulfur.

name: Imidacloprid
desc: Controls sucking pests like aphids and whiteflies.

name: Chlorpyrifos
desc: Used against termites and soil insects.

name: Malathion
desc: Used to control many agricultural pests.

name: Mancozeb
desc: Protects crops from blight and leaf spots.

name: Copper Oxychloride
desc: Used against bacterial and fungal diseases.

name: Tricyclazole
desc: Used mainly for rice blast disease.

name: Tebuconazole
desc: Effective against rust and leaf diseases.

name: Glyphosate
desc: Non-selective herbicide used to kill weeds.

name: Metolachlor
desc: Used in soybean and maize fields.

name: Neem Oil
desc: Natural pesticide used in organic farming.

name: Seaweed Extract
desc: Improves plant growth and stress resistance.

name: Mustard Cake
desc: Organic fertilizer used in many crops.
